name: GIGABYTE B650 AORUS ELITE AX ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6666(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B650 AORUS ELITE AX ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX B650 AORUS motherboard for AMD AM5 socket with DDR5 support and WiFi 6E connectivity.
